validation_evidence.summary: Syntax check passed with no stdout or stderr output.

Focused contract test target remains RED. Failures are missing control-plane JSON contract fields and public codes: schemaVersion/data/next undefined, top-level failure code/message/details undefined, missing required ERROR_CODES entries, and clean --all --json schemaVersion undefined. No syntax or harness failure was introduced.

recovery_guidance: Implement the missing control-plane JSON contract behavior in production code to satisfy the existing RED assertions.
Keep the clean --all --json refusal non-interactive: stderr must not contain prompt text, stdout must remain one parseable JSON object, and configured clean targets must not be deleted without --yes.
concerns: The focused target has multiple pre-existing RED contract assertions beyond T006, so this repair cannot produce a GREEN test run without production implementation outside the assigned write scope.

consumer_evidence.task: T006 JSON contract RED-test no-prompt assertion repair
